reviews.review_text: Excellent food and service.  Even though someone called in we were surprised we had such good service, thanks to Sherry again.
Great food and quick, attentive service by Sherry!
Sherry was awesome, fast and accommodating. The food was delicious. Will definitely come back again. I work around jackson and this is my new favorite.
A staple in out date night. Los Tes never fails us. Great food, great atmosphere and Amanda is a wonderful server. Ask for her.
Sherry was an awesome server!!
Macenzye was our server, great experience and food was excellent

Food is great. Always great service. We love Kari shes the best.
Kerry is the best!! Friendly and a great server/bartender...makes the best drinks and great customer service

I love everything about this place and always have great experiences and love seeing familiar wait staff that consistently offer great service.
Food is great. Always great service. We love Kari shes the best.

Unfortunately the last two times we ate at this restaurant my family and I got super sick. I actually had to go to the hospital for one of them. We will never eat here again. I don’t know what is different the last two months but before that we never had any problems.

Was passing through the area and decided to try because it had 4.1 stars.
The food here is not good. There were 3 of us and meals were edible but too salty and not flavorful.
There was 1 server working on a Sunday, she was friendly and doing her best
